projectInstructions: MANDATORY: Before writing ANY code on this project, read AGENT_ONBOARDING_CHECKLIST.md and follow it step by step. It contains the required reading order, verification steps, and the five most common mistakes to avoid. Key rules: (1) Use EF.* constants from aidm/schemas/entity_fields.py for all entity field access — never bare string literals. (2) This is D&D 3.5e — no 5e concepts (no advantage/disadvantage, no short/long rest, damage type is 'electricity' not 'electric'). (3) Resolvers return events only, never mutate WorldState. (4) No set() objects in state, no floats in deterministic paths, all json.dumps must use sort_keys=True. (5) Do NOT fix items in KNOWN_TECH_DEBT.md unless explicitly asked. After every CP: run 'python -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short' (expect 594+ tests passing in <2s) and update PROJECT_STATE_DIGEST.md.
